$schema: Parameters for auc-asset-master-creation.spec.ts — BP_IT_B2P_GUI_AuC Asset Master Data Creation-VendorTool (AS01 → AS03)
$note: AS01 is DESTRUCTIVE — it creates a real Asset Under Construction master record in SAP. The spec captures the new asset number from the SAP status bar and uses it for AS03 verification. Adjust costCenter / plant to values valid in your company code before running.

discoverFromAsset.$comment: Before AS01, open AS03 on this existing asset to discover a valid Cost Center / Plant. Same asset as the asset-balance-check test, known-good in company 8540.
